ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject area of the course (e.g., ACCY) */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Course number assigned to the course */,
  "crn" INTEGER /* Course Registration Number */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Official title of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Course description */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Instructor's name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Instructor's email */,
  "department" TEXT /* Instructor's department */,
  "title" TEXT /* Instructor's title */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the courses table */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the instructors table */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is offered in */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year the course is offered in */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of class scheduling (e.g., ONL for online, LCD for lecture) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course offering was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course offering was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_performance" (
  "course_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course performance metric */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the courseofferings table */,
  "num_A_plus" INTEGER /* Number of A+ grades awarded */,
  "num_A" INTEGER /* Number of A grades awarded */,
  "num_A_minus" INTEGER /* Number of A- grades awarded */,
  "num_B_plus" INTEGER /* Number of B+ grades awarded */,
  "num_B" INTEGER /* Number of B grades awarded */,
  "num_B_minus" INTEGER /* Number of B- grades awarded */,
  "num_C_plus" INTEGER /* Number of C+ grades awarded */,
  "num_C" INTEGER /* Number of C grades awarded */,
  "num_C_minus" INTEGER /* Number of C- grades awarded */,
  "num_D_plus" INTEGER /* Number of D+ grades awarded */,
  "num_D" INTEGER /* Number of D grades awarded */,
  "num_D_minus" INTEGER /* Number of D- grades awarded */,
  "num_F" INTEGER /* Number of F grades awarded */,
  "num_W" INTEGER /* Number of Withdrawals (W) */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Student's name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email */,
  "major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Student's GPA */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the students table */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the courseofferings table */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Student's grade in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_offering_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the courseofferings table */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, exam, project) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assessment in the course grade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_results" (
  "assessment_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment result */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the enrollments table */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the assessments table */,
  "score" REAL /* Student's score on the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_result_id")
)
